file: string(), // relative to project root

name: MetricResultSchema
content: MetricResultSchema: scope: string(), // e.g., 'project', 'src/services', 'src/api/routes.ts'; value: number(), // numeric metric (violation count, complexity score, etc.); violations: array(ViolationSchema); metadata: record(z.unknown()).optional()

constraints: value: number(), // numeric metric (violation count, complexity score, etc.)

name: CategoryBaselineSchema
content: CategoryBaselineSchema: value: number(), // aggregate metric value at baseline time; violationIds: array(z.string()), // stable IDs of known violations (the allowlist)

violationIds: array(z.string()), // stable IDs of known violations (the allowlist)

name: ArchBaselineSchema

name: CategoryRegressionSchema
content: CategoryRegressionSchema: baselineValue: number(); currentValue: number(); delta: number()

name: ArchDiffResultSchema
content: ArchDiffResultSchema: passed: boolean(); newViolations: array(ViolationSchema), // in current but not in baseline -> FAIL; resolvedViolations: array(z.string()), // in baseline but not in current -> celebrate; preExisting: array(z.string()), // in both -> allowed, tracked; regressions: array(CategoryRegressionSchema), // aggregate value exceeded baseline

constraints: newViolations: array(ViolationSchema), // in current but not in baseline -> FAIL
resolvedViolations: array(z.string()), // in baseline but not in current -> celebrate
preExisting: array(z.string()), // in both -> allowed, tracked
regressions: array(CategoryRegressionSchema), // aggregate value exceeded baseline

name: RuleConfigSchema
content: RuleConfigSchema: name: string().regex(/^[a-z][a-z0-9]*(-[a-z0-9]+)*$/, 'Rule name must be kebab-case'); type: string().min(1); severity: enum(['error', 'warn', 'off']).default('error'); config: record(z.unknown())

name: LinterConfigSchema
content: LinterConfigSchema: version: literal(1); output: string().min(1); templates: record(z.string()).optional(); rules: array(RuleConfigSchema).min(1, 'At least one rule is required')

constraints: rules: array(RuleConfigSchema).min(1, 'At least one rule is required')

name: RunResultSchema
content: RunResultSchema: taskId: string(); startedAt: string(); completedAt: string(); status: enum(['success', 'failure', 'skipped', 'no-issues']); findings: number(); fixed: number(); prUrl: string().nullable(); prUpdated: boolean(); error: string().optional()

name: AnalyzeRequestSchema
content: AnalyzeRequestSchema: title: string().min(1); description: string().optional(); labels: array(z.string()).optional()

name: ChatRequestSchema
content: ChatRequestSchema: prompt: string().min(1); system: string().optional(); sessionId: string().regex(UUID_RE).optional()

name: DispatchAdHocRequestSchema
content: DispatchAdHocRequestSchema: title: string().min(1); description: string().optional(); labels: array(z.string()).optional()

name: InteractionUpdateSchema
content: InteractionUpdateSchema: status: enum(['pending', 'claimed', 'resolved'])

name: TriggerRequestSchema
content: TriggerRequestSchema: taskId: string().min(1)

name: PlanWriteSchema
content: PlanWriteSchema: filename: string().min(1); content: string().min(1)

name: AppendRoadmapRequestSchema
content: AppendRoadmapRequestSchema: title: string().min(1); summary: string().optional(); labels: array(z.string()).optional(); intent: string(); unknowns: array(z.string()); ambiguities: array(z.string()); riskSignals: array(z.string()); affectedSystems: array(z.object({ name: z.string() }))
